body:
Updated the requirements with **R0 — ask the user what to report before collecting anything** (full harness log / full server log / trimmed GitHub issue / report-to-Formal-AI-itself; then a follow-up on what to include), using the harness's structured-options UI when supported and plain-text Q&A otherwise.

Also corrected the Links Notation guidance (R4/R7): ordered collections now use the native **repeated-key sequence** idiom (`messages` → repeated `message`, `parts` → repeated `part`) with no `message_0…N` index keys and as few parentheses as possible. The reference extractor was updated accordingly and **verified to round-trip through the `links-notation` 0.13 grammar**, including the colon-quoting / delimiter-selection / base64-fallback value rules. Gist updated: https://gist.github.com/konard/158786543dbfb26efa8f3437d41d20dd
